post.content:
Status: Two years experience at Fintech
Position: SDE1
Location: Bangalore

Hi folks,

I was asked to design a booking service for conference rooms.

Things I did:
1. I did a thorough design involving Room, RoomService, Schedule, ScheduleService, RoomSelectionStrategy.
2. Used a `vector<pair<Datetime,Datetime>>` to store the booked time slot in Room object.
3. `isAvailable` iterates over all booked time slots and return false if there is clash with the requirement
4. Used RoomSelectionStrategy as a separate class to take care of separation of concerns.

Things I messed up:
1. Went over time
2. Forgot to inject RoomService as a dependency in ScheduleService
3. Forgot to update booked time slot vector in Room

There was one DSA round that I aced before this one.

I am anxious about the results, what do you folks think, will I move ahead or be rejected at this point?

Thanks

Depends on how much time extra time you took, 5-10 more mins should be fine IMO. [#2](https://leetcode.com/problems/add-two-numbers) does not matter as much in an interview setup, I think you should be fine. [#3](https://leetcode.com/problems/longest-substring-without-repeating-characters) will defintely give negative marks, but overall I think you chances are good. You are able to solve a lot of things, if you did them correctly and the interiviewer is happy with it, I would say you have a fair chance. Good luck
Can you share DSA question asked from you
